author: aguynamedchriss
title: Wish it worked…
content: App crashes every time I try to play a 360 mp4 on my NAS. And if I add those mp4s to my library, the app crashes forever / I need to uninstall the app to fix.

author: Gabsapps
title: Lack of atmos support turns me off
content: If we can get Dolby atmos in a update I’ll change my review u guys did get it working in flacbox we need it here

author: Kellie calderón
title: This app is good but I’m having a problem
content: This app is good, but when I’m trying to play my files on shuffle mode, the app get stuck
